records.summary_analyst: CVE-2024-7399 is a vulnerability in Samsung Magicinfo 9 Server that allows remote attackers to exploit improper input validation, resulting in potential code execution on the affected component.
records.summary_ciso: CVE-2024-7399 exposes Samsung Magicinfo 9 Server to potential unauthorized access and data breaches, posing an immediate risk to sensitive business information and necessitating urgent remediation to protect organizational integrity and customer trust.
records.description: CVE-2024-7399 is a vulnerability in Samsung Magicinfo 9 Server that allows remote attackers to exploit improper input validation, resulting in potential code execution on the affected component.

records.summary_analyst: CVE-2026-39987 affects Coreweave Marimo by allowing an attacker to exploit a buffer overflow vulnerability in the component that handles user input, potentially leading to arbitrary code execution.
records.summary_ciso: CVE-2026-39987 poses a significant security risk to Coreweave Marimo, potentially exposing sensitive data and critical business operations to exploitation, necessitating immediate mitigation to protect our assets and maintain customer trust.
records.description: CVE-2026-39987 affects Coreweave Marimo by allowing an attacker to exploit a buffer overflow vulnerability in the component that handles user input, potentially leading to arbitrary code execution.

records.summary_analyst: CVE-2025-29635 is a vulnerability in Dlink Dir-823x firmware that allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary commands via shell metacharacters in the "username" parameter of a web configuration request.

records.description: CVE-2025-29635 is a vulnerability in Dlink Dir-823x firmware that allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary commands via shell metacharacters in the "username" parameter of a web configuration request.
